calendar.title: Team Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Scheduled visits — week of {weekLabel}
calendar.confirmCancelText: Do you confirm the cancellation of this visit?

sentRequests.title: My Reassignment Requests
sentRequests.subtitle: Status of requests you have sent to your colleagues
sentRequests.emptyTitle: You have not sent any requests
sentRequests.emptyText: When you request a reassignment from the calendar, it will appear here.
sentRequests.acceptedInfo: Your colleague has accepted the reassignment! The appointment is now on their schedule.
sentRequests.rejectedInfo: Your colleague has rejected the request. The appointment remains yours.
sentRequests.cancelModalText: Are you sure you want to cancel this reassignment request?

scheduleVisit.title: Schedule visit
scheduleVisit.subtitle: Select an available property from the list
scheduleVisit.available: The schedule is available. You can confirm the visit.
scheduleVisit.noVehiclesAvailable: No vehicles are available for that schedule
scheduleVisit.vehicleDependsOnSchedule: The selector updates according to the selected date and time.
scheduleVisit.loadingVehiclesHelp: Checking fleet availability for that schedule...
scheduleVisit.noVehiclesHelp: Try another time slot or leave the visit without a vehicle.
scheduleVisit.vehicleOptionalHelp: Optional. Only vehicles available for that schedule are shown.
scheduleVisit.vehicleAssignWarning: The visit was created, but the selected vehicle could not be assigned.
scheduleVisit.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: The client arrives late, keys at reception...
scheduleVisit.agentIdError: Error: Could not identify your agent ID. Please try logging in again.
scheduleVisit.startTimeRequired: Start date and time are required
scheduleVisit.endTimeRequired: End date and time are required
scheduleVisit.preferredDateTimeRequired: Preferred date and time are required

rescheduleVisit.title: Reschedule Visit
rescheduleVisit.subtitle: Select a new date and time for the visit
rescheduleVisit.notesPlaceholder: E.g.: The client arrives late, keys at reception...
rescheduleVisit.errorMessage: Error rescheduling visit. Please try again.
rescheduleVisit.status409: This visit cannot be rescheduled because it is not cancelled.
rescheduleVisit.status422: The agent or property is not available at that date and time.
rescheduleVisit.referenceInfo: A new visit will be created with the same property, client, and agent. The cancelled visit will remain as a reference.
rescheduleVisit.agentAndPropertyAvailability: The system will verify that the agent and property are available.
rescheduleVisit.editingVehicleNotAvailable: Vehicle reassignment for rescheduled visits is not yet available from this form.
rescheduleVisit.newDateTimeRequired: The new start time is required.
rescheduleVisit.newDateTimeFuture: The new start time must be in the future.

visitDetail.title: Visit Detail
visitDetail.rescheduledFrom: This visit was created by rescheduling the original visit.
visitDetail.confirmCancelText: Are you sure you want to cancel this visit? This action cannot be undone.

conflict.title: Schedule conflict detected
conflict.scheduledVisits: Visits already scheduled at that time:

reassignment.submitError: Failed to submit the reassignment request.
reassignment.respondError: Failed to respond to the request.
reassignment.title: Request Reassignment
reassignment.toastSuccess: Request sent! Your colleague will be notified.
reassignment.reasonPlaceholder: E.g.: I have a family emergency and cannot attend this visit...
reassignment.loadAgentsError: Could not load the list of agents.
reassignment.validationSelect: You must select a destination colleague.
reassignment.validationReasonMin: The reason must be at least 10 characters.
reassignment.sendError: Error sending request. Please try again.
reassignment.success: Request sent! Your colleague will be notified.

reassignmentInbox.title: Reassignment Requests
reassignmentInbox.subtitle: Requests awaiting your response
reassignmentInbox.emptyText: You have no pending reassignment requests.
reassignmentInbox.toastAccepted: Request accepted. The visit was added to your schedule.
reassignmentInbox.toastRejected: Request rejected. The original agent keeps the visit.

confirmResponseModal.acceptSubtitle: This visit will be added to your schedule.
confirmResponseModal.rejectSubtitle: The visit will remain with the original agent.
confirmResponseModal.acceptPlaceholder: E.g.: Happy to help, I will be available.
confirmResponseModal.rejectPlaceholder: E.g.: Unfortunately I also have a commitment at that time.
